title: RefundRadar
one_liner: Slack alert when refund rate spikes above 7-day baseline
wedge: Shopify webhook on refunds; posts to Slack with SKU breakdown and suspected cause — no ML, rules only. $29/mo.

title: MirrorFit
one_liner: Generative full-body digital twin try-on from a single selfie
wedge: Customer uploads selfie; diffusion model reconstructs body mesh and drapes every SKU in catalog in realtime on PDP.

title: TagDoctor
one_liner: Bulk-fix product tags and collections from a spreadsheet UI
wedge: Admin UI maps CSV columns to tags/collections; preview diff; one-click apply via Shopify Admin API. Ship in a week.

title: VoiceShop
one_liner: Realtime founder voice answers every PDP question via cloned voice
wedge: GPT-4o Realtime API + 60s voice clone; shoppers speak questions; answers stream in founder voice on every product page.

title: CartNudge
one_liner: One-click post-add upsell block in cart drawer
wedge: Theme app extension shows single complementary SKU from last-90-day co-purchase pairs; merchant sets margin floor. $19/mo flat.
